command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"
GITEA="http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance"
TOKEN="044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6"

echo "=== CLEAR EXISTING AUDIT FILES ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" "$GITEA" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,urllib.request
files=json.load(sys.stdin)
token='044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6'
for f in files:
    if f['name']!='.gitkeep':
        body=json.dumps({'message':'clear: '+f['name'],'sha':f['sha'],'branch':'main'}).encode()
        req=urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance/'+f['name'],
            data=body,method='DELETE',headers={'Authorization':'token '+token,'Content-Type':'application/json'})
        urllib.request.urlopen(req).read()
        print('Deleted:', f['name'])
"

echo ""
echo "=== RUN 5 VALIDATION TESTS ==="
sleep 1

echo "Test 1: router info"
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' > /dev/null

echo "Test 2: needs approval"
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-002","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 9A.2 audit test"}' > /dev/null

echo "Test 3: needs rollback"
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-003","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","evidence":"test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' > /dev/null

echo "Test 4: needs baseline"
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-004","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' > /dev/null

echo "Test 5: all present"
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-005","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"all present","approvalStatus":"APPROVED","approvalReference":"Jose-approved-9A2-005"}' > /dev/null

sleep 5

echo ""
echo "=== AUDIT FILES IN GITEA ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" "$GITEA" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,urllib.request,base64
files=json.load(sys.stdin)
audit=[f for f in files if f['name']!='.gitkeep']
print(f'Total audit files: {len(audit)}')
for f in sorted(audit,key=lambda x: x['name']):
    print(f'  {f[\"name\"]}')
    # Fetch and show key fields
    req=urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance/'+f['name'],
        headers={'Authorization':'token 044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6'})
    d=json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read())
    rec=json.loads(base64.b64decode(d['content']))
    print(f'    result={rec.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={rec.get(\"blocked\")} requestor={rec.get(\"requestor\")} type={rec.get(\"request_type\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json,urllib.request,base64
req=urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance',
    headers={'Authorization':'token 044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6'})
files=json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read())
audit=[f for f in files if f['name']!='.gitkeep']
print(f'Audit files created: {len(audit)} (expected 5)')
print(f'Phase 9A.2 Complete: {len(audit)>=5}')
"
